summary: Iter 202 backend + frontend verification. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iter202_bulk_ops_reports.py (32 tests) covering bulk-ops attendance in/out round trip, salary excel preview, transfer/resignation/shift-assign validations, PT/LWF/Gratuity/F&F/Advance-Loan/MIS JSON+XLSX+PDF, CLRA XLSX exports, grid.totals.present_days_policy, the 8-HR compliance sub-point round trip (flag ON → 10hr day splits duty<=8h + ot>=1h; flag reset OFF), and 401 auth checks. All 32 tests PASS after one small backend fix (openpyxl sheet-title sanitize). Frontend: /bulk-operations page loads correctly with 6 tabs (Attendance Upload / Salary Revision / Transfer / Resignation / Shift Assign / History), format chips (Status Grid / In-Out Times) and Download template button; sidebar shows Bulk Operations entry, Reports group and firm selector shows Kankani Enterprises · KEPS. Deep clicks into every sub-tab and /statutory-reports, /clra-registers, /attendance-grid were partially verified — repeated cross-page navigation caused the auth session to redirect back to the sign-in landing (localStorage token injected but Web app re-hydrates through a role gate after visiting '/'), so items 15/16/17 need one manual pass or a bulk-nav retest. No React-Native/Expo deprecation issues found in the touched screens (this is the Expo web PWA).

minor.issue: openpyxl rejects '/' in sheet title — was raising 500 'Invalid character / found in sheet title'. FIXED in /app/backend/routes/statutory_extra_reports.py `_xlsx_bytes` by replacing forbidden chars (/\*?:[]) with '-'.

integration_issues.flow: Super-admin web session persistence across page.goto navigations in Playwright
integration_issues.issue: Injecting session_token into localStorage works on the first authenticated route load (/bulk-operations rendered fine), but navigating first to '/' clears the intended route and shows the landing 'Sign in to continue' card again. Suggests the SPA reads token from a different store (e.g. Zustand-persist under an alternate key) or rehydrates asynchronously. Recommend main agent expose a documented test-hook or accept ?token= in URL. Non-blocking for real users.

issues: Console warnings: 'Invalid style property outline / background' and shorthand padding '0 8px' — RN-web style warnings; harmless but noisy.

action_items: None blocking. Optional: normalize RN-web style shorthand ('outline', 'background', padding '0 8px') to silence console warnings.
Optional: provide a test-mode auth-inject helper so playwright can traverse multiple protected pages after cross-nav to '/'.
critical_code_review_comments: openpyxl sheet-title had to be sanitized (fixed) — apply the same guard to any other _xlsx path that uses the report title verbatim.
Bulk-ops attendance-apply does not currently expose a batch-delete endpoint. Cleanup here was done via direct mongo. Consider adding DELETE /api/admin/attendance/by-batch/{batch} for operator undo.
bulk_ops.py `_revise_actual` uses a `for/else` that recomputes new_basic even when a Basic row is found; harmless but the `else` clause is redundant.

success_rate.frontend: 70% (Bulk Operations page fully verified; statutory-reports/clra-registers/attendance-grid pages not deeply clicked due to auth-state loss on cross-navigation)

seed_data_creation: No permanent seed data. Test-created punches for TEST50 on 2026-07-20 and 2026-08-05 were removed via mongo (import_batch). policy_master.compliance_present_8hr was toggled to true then reset to false.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For frontend E2E on protected pages, prefer landing on /company-login (or /admin-set-password), inject token BEFORE the SPA hydrates, then go directly to the target page. Cross-navigating through '/' first will re-route to the sign-in landing.
rca_of_issue: advance-loan xlsx 500: title 'Advance / Loan Register' contains '/' which openpyxl forbids in worksheet titles. Fix applied in _xlsx_bytes by stripping /\*?:[] characters. Verified via pytest — all report/xlsx endpoints now return PK-magic xlsx bytes.
